description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Compare Study Genomic Change Annotation that runs on push to the master branch. For the oncokb/oncokb-annotator repository, set up a macOS job that checks out the code, installs Python 3.8, and installs dependencies from requirements files. Run flake8 linting, then annotate the msk_impact_2017 study using the MafAnnotator.py script with tokens from secrets. Finally, compare the annotation result with the one from the master branch and exit with non-zero status if differences are found.
